moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The world's most prestigious tennis tournament, Wimbledon, begins its 2026 edition at the All England Club on Monday, June 29.

angles.name: General Excitement
angles.copy: Strawberries & cream at the ready! Wimbledon 2026 officially starts Monday. Who are you backing for the title?

angles.name: UK Hopefuls
angles.copy: Centre Court awaits! All eyes on the British hopefuls as Wimbledon begins on Monday. Can anyone go all the way?

moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Continues
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026, hosted across North America, is well underway, with England and Scotland among the home nations competing for glory.

angles.name: Daily Update
angles.copy: Another day, another dose of World Cup action! Who are you tipping to shine in today's games?

angles.name: Home Nation Focus
angles.copy: England and Scotland are flying the flag at the World Cup! How far do you think they'll go this year?

moments.title: Blenheim Palace Festival Underway
moments.blurb: The debut Blenheim Palace Festival in Oxfordshire features a stellar line-up this week, including Pete Tong Ibiza Classics (June 27), Alanis Morissette (June 28), Teddy Swims (June 30), Katy Perry (July 1), and Michael Bublé (July 4).

angles.name: Pete Tong Highlight
angles.copy: Blenheim Palace Festival kicks off this weekend with Pete Tong Ibiza Classics! Who's ready for some iconic dance anthems in a stately setting?

angles.name: Diverse Lineup
angles.copy: From Alanis Morissette to Katy Perry and Michael Bublé, Blenheim Palace Festival has something for everyone this week. Who are you most excited to see?

moments.title: BST Hyde Park Continues
moments.blurb: American Express presents BST Hyde Park is ongoing in London, bringing major artists like Lewis Capaldi, Pitbull, and Garth Brooks to the iconic venue.

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Hyde Park is buzzing with BST! Who's heading to see the likes of Lewis Capaldi, Pitbull or Garth Brooks this week?

angles.name: London Calling
angles.copy: London's biggest summer festival, BST Hyde Park, is in full swing. What's been your highlight so far?

moments.title: State Fayre Festival Opens
moments.blurb: New festival State Fayre, billed as 'the UK's biggest music and BBQ festival', opens its gates in Chelmsford tomorrow (June 26-28), featuring headliners Kings of Leon and Alanis Morissette.

angles.name: New Festival Buzz
angles.copy: Get ready, Chelmsford! The brand new State Fayre festival kicks off tomorrow with Kings of Leon and Alanis Morissette. Who's going?

angles.name: Americana Theme
angles.copy: Music and BBQ! State Fayre promises an American state fair vibe with Alanis Morissette and more from tomorrow. What are you looking forward to?

moments.title: Official UK Singles Chart Latest
moments.blurb: Taylor Swift's 'I Knew It, I Knew You' holds the No. 1 spot on the Official UK Singles Chart, while Olivia Rodrigo's new track 'Stupid Song' debuts at No. 2.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Still at No.1! Taylor Swift reigns supreme on the Official UK Singles Chart. What's your favourite T-Swift track right now?

angles.name: New Entry
angles.copy: Olivia Rodrigo's 'Stupid Song' is a massive new entry at No.2 on the singles chart! Have you heard her new album yet?

moments.title: Cardiff City 2026/27 Fixtures Announced
moments.blurb: Cardiff City's 2026/27 Championship fixtures have been announced today, with a pre-season friendly against FC Midtjylland on July 11 and Cork City on July 14, ahead of their league opener against Wrexham on August 17.

angles.name: Fixture Release
angles.copy: It's here! Cardiff City's 2026/27 Championship fixtures are out today. Which match are you circling on your calendar?

angles.name: Pre-Season Build-Up
angles.copy: Cardiff City fans, get ready! Pre-season friendlies against FC Midtjylland (July 11) and Cork City (July 14) are just around the corner. How are you feeling about the new season?

moments.title: Wales U19s in Action
moments.blurb: The Wales U19 football team has a busy week, facing Spain U19 on June 28, Germany U19 on July 1, and Denmark U19 on July 4 in the UEFA Under-19 Championship Group Stage.

angles.name: Youth Football Pride
angles.copy: Big week for the future of Welsh football! Our U19s take on Spain, Germany, and Denmark. Show them your support!

angles.name: Upcoming Matches
angles.copy: Catch the Wales U19s in action this week! Spain on Sunday, Germany on Wednesday, and Denmark next Saturday. Who's watching?

moments.title: Anish Kapoor Major UK Exhibition
moments.blurb: Anish Kapoor's first major UK exhibition in 30 years is currently open in London, showcasing new works with futuristic light-absorbing nanotechnology alongside his career-defining pieces.

angles.name: Art & Culture
angles.copy: Mind-bending art in London! Anish Kapoor's first major UK exhibition in 30 years is now open. Have you seen it yet?

angles.name: Must-See Exhibition
angles.copy: Don't miss it! Anish Kapoor's groundbreaking new exhibition is a must-see in London, featuring incredible new works and iconic sculptures.

moments.title: Chris Isaak's 70th Birthday
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Chris Isaak, known for hits like 'Wicked Game', turns 70 tomorrow (June 26).

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Happy 70th Birthday tomorrow to the legendary Chris Isaak! What's your all-time favourite song from him?

moments.title: H.E.R.'s 29th Birthday
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning R&B singer H.E.R. (Gabriella Wilson) celebrates her 29th birthday on Sunday (June 27).

angles.name: Birthday Vibes
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 29th Birthday to the incredibly talented H.E.R. on Sunday! What's your go-to track from her?

moments.title: Nicole Scherzinger's 48th Birthday
moments.blurb: Singer, dancer, and TV personality Nicole Scherzinger, best known as the lead singer of The Pussycat Dolls, turns 48 on Monday (June 29).

angles.name: Birthday Girl
angles.copy: Happy 48th Birthday to the fabulous Nicole Scherzinger on Monday! Which Pussycat Dolls hit is your favourite?

moments.title: RZA's 57th Birthday
moments.blurb: Founding member of the Wu-Tang Clan, rapper and producer RZA (Robert Diggs) celebrates his 57th birthday on July 5.

angles.name: Hip Hop Legend
angles.copy: Happy 57th Birthday to the one and only RZA on July 5! What's your favourite Wu-Tang Clan track or RZA-produced hit?

moments.title: Glastonbury Fallow Year
moments.blurb: Glastonbury Festival is taking its traditional 'fallow year' in 2026 to allow Worthy Farm to recover, with the next festival scheduled for 2027.

angles.name: No Glasto This Year
angles.copy: No Pyramid Stage this year! It's Glastonbury's fallow year, giving Worthy Farm a well-deserved rest. What are your favourite Glasto memories?

angles.name: Looking to 2027
angles.copy: Missing Glastonbury already? Don't worry, it'll be back bigger and better in 2027! Who do you want to see headline next time?

moments.title: Liam Gallagher Confirms No Oasis Tour in 2026
moments.blurb: Despite recent reunion speculation, Liam Gallagher has confirmed there will be no Oasis tour in 2026, stating 'Nothing going on next year except the WC (World Cup)'.

angles.name: Oasis Tour Quashed
angles.copy: Bad news for Oasis fans hoping for a 2026 tour: Liam Gallagher says it's not happening! Are you disappointed?

angles.name: Focus on World Cup
angles.copy: Liam Gallagher says the only big event for him in 2026 is the World Cup, not an Oasis tour. Fair enough, or are you hoping for 2027?
